title: EVACUATION INFORMATION - 211info
text: NATURAL DISASTER RESOURCES POLK COUNTY EVACUATION INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on emergencies occurring within the county. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
